justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially interpreted "three days from today" as June 4th, 2026, when the conversation took place on June 7th, 2026, indicating a misinterpretation of the relative date.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots on the same day when the user's preferred times were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two separate calls to check availability for June 4th at 2 PM and June 5th at 11 AM, when a single call could have been made for both.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated unavailability and the agent's initial misinterpretation of the date made the conversation slightly more tedious than necessary.
